blocks.content:
Grafana provides built-in support for Tempo. In this milestone, you navigate to Connections, search for Tempo, and give your new data source a descriptive name.

To add the Tempo data source, complete the following steps:
In the navigation menu, click **Connections > Data sources**.
In the **Filter by name or type** field, enter `Tempo`.

At the top of the page, next to the data source name, click the edit (pencil) icon and enter a descriptive name for your Tempo data source.

For example, enter `Production Tempo`.

**Did you know?** The name of the data source is displayed on dashboard panels and in the data source picker in Explore, so it's important to choose a meaningful name.
In the next milestone, you configure the connection URL for your Tempo backend.

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Configure the Tempo data source](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/tempo/configure-tempo-data-source/)
- [Data source plugins for Grafana](https://grafana.com/grafana/plugins/data-source-plugins/)
